narrative.zh: 一封神秘的密码信！数字序列隐藏了秘密信息——破解它！
narrative.en: A mysterious coded letter! The number sequence hides a secret message — crack it!

narrative.zh: 密码的第二层是矩阵变换！把密码表旋转90度才能读出真正的信息！
narrative.en: The second layer uses matrix transforms! Rotate the cipher grid 90° to reveal the message!

narrative.zh: 最后一关！用天平方程解出密码的最后一个数字！
narrative.en: Final level! Solve the balance equation to find the last digit of the code!
